positive: A vibrant, minimalist illustration of a howling wolf silhouette reaching up to an oversized full moon. The background should feature a stylized, gentle gradient of deep indigo and turquoise, suggesting a cosmic night sky. The moon should be prominently central, emitting a soft, ethereal glow that highlights the wolf's form. Include subtle constellations formed by small, glowing lines, adding depth without clutter. Use a bold, graphic, vector art style with high contrast and clean edges, suitable for screen printing on apparel. The composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical to maximize impact.
negative: blur, watermark, signature, text, logo, cartoon, low resolution, artifacts, blurry, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grainy, noise, messy, muted colors
